title: Tied in a Little Bowtie
description: TILB is a texture pack that changes how the locator bar dot looks, with some customizability!
body: Ever wanted to make your locator bar just a little bit more whimsical? Make it a little prettier? (wow, now THAT'S a generic description) This texture pack changes how the locator bar dot looks, with it's default now being the unused(?) bowtie texture that is still in the game for some reason?? plus some other textures i made myself, so you can customize it even more! :) Buy me a Coffee if ya want! To change which texture is used, go to this directory inside the zip file "assets\minecraft\textures\gui\sprites\hud\locator_bar_dot" and replace the "default_0-3" textures with the ones inside any folder in locator_bar_dot.
